parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ wave_lead_id: $json.wave_lead_id, jednatel_id: $json.jednatel_id, email_address: $json.email_address, sequence_number: $json.sequence_number, subject_rendered: $json.subject_rendered, body_rendered: $json.body_rendered, scheduled_at: $json.scheduled_at, status: $json.status, thread_subject: $json.thread_subject, max_sequence_number: $json.max_sequence_number, retry_count: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ send_date_seq1: $json.send_date_seq1 || null, send_date_seq2: $json.send_date_seq2 || null, send_date_seq3: $json.send_date_seq3 || null, send_time_seq1: $json.send_time_seq1 || null, send_time_seq2: $json.send_time_seq2 || null, send_time_seq3: $json.send_time_seq3 || null, scheduling_report: $json.scheduling_report || null }) }}
